scene: A tiny stick kid lies back in tall green grass under a huge slow yellow sun, the word SUMMER hand-lettered very wide across the top, composed tall to fill the vertical frame. Lazy and endless. Selective pop: the big yellow sun.

An adult stick figure watches a wall calendar's pages blast off and fly up and away in a fast blur, big hand-lettered DECEMBER, composed tall. A year gone in a blink. Selective pop: the red motion lines.

One simple pie chart with a single razor-thin red sliver slice, a small arrow and hand-lettered ONE YEAR pointing at the sliver, composed tall, mostly empty. One year is a tiny slice of a whole life. Selective pop: the thin red sliver.
A single huge hand-lettered NOPE in bold red filling the center of the frame, composed tall, mostly empty white. Selective pop: the red NOPE.

Two stick-figure hands gently grip a wall clock and slow its fast-spinning hands down to a calm stop, soft motion lines settling, composed tall, mostly empty. Slowing time back down. Selective pop: the clock hands.
